title: Act 1 - Part 1 - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### December 1st

* * *

As soon as you gain control of Rean, you'll notice the addition of the ability to **Quick Travel** under the navigation menu. Your first task is to head to the general store and speak to Raio, the shopkeeper on the right. The game will introduce you to weapon synthesis and the process of unlocking Orbment Slots. The Orbment system involves upgrading slots to equip more potent types of Quartz.

\- Advertisement -

Next, speak to Camillia. Watching the event scene with her will unlock the item trading function, similar to the pawn shop feature from the previous game. (**Note**: If this is your second playthrough, she will allow you to trade Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.)

Before leaving town through Ymir Canyon, don't forget to speak to **Luke** near the wreckage of the station. He'll provide you with some Tear Balms to aid you on your journey. Once you're ready, it's time to venture out.

**Lunaria Nature Park**

After the event scene, you will be warped into **Lunaria Nature Park**. Head south to Lunaria Nature Park 3. The game will let you know that this area contains high elements, which means Time, Space, and Mirage elements have effects on monsters here, there is also an additional type of bonus effects on turn order which can be an advantage or disadvantage for your party. Head down to the southeast corner to pick up a **Stone Brooch** in a treasure chest, then continue all the way to the southwest path. On the very southwest corner of the map contains some **Sepith Mass** in the treasure box. Then head to the exit located southeast of **Lunaria Nature Park 2**.

The path will then split into two ways, head to the west end to get a **Teara Balm** from the treasure box, and there is also a fishing spot near this area. Afterwards, go to the east end to get **Citrus Bottle** from the treasure chest. Then take the bridge south and go all the way to the west corner to find a [Scepter](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Scepter "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") **Master Quartz** in a monster chest. Then head to the opposite end, by the east area for an **EP Charge II**. After that go to the south exit of the map to go to Lunaria Nature Park 1.

Head south, and go to the east side of the map to the northeast corner to find an **HP 1** in a treasure chest, then head south and go all the way to the southwest corner to get some **Sepith**. Then they the center path south, when you're near the end of the park, you will see an Orbment Charging Station. Leave the park to face a boss battle.

[![Trails of cold steel ii lunaria nature park.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/5/57/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lunaria_nature_park.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lunaria_nature_park.png)

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Blade Horn | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |
| Polyjelly | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fan |
| Purple Ooze | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fan |
| Gordi Chief | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Sasa Panda | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
|  |
| --- |
| # | Type | Item Name | Location |
| 11/239 | Accessory | Stone Brooch | Lunaria Nature Park 3 |
| 12/239 | Other | Sepith Mass x100 |
| 13/239 | Healing Item | Teara Balm | Lunaria Nature Park 2 |
| 14/239 | Accessory | Citrus Bottle |
| 15/239 | Master Quartz | Scepter |
| 16/239 | Healing Item | EP Charge II |
| 17/239 | Quartz | HP 1 | Lunaria Nature Park 1 |
| 18/239 | Sepith | All Sepith x100 |
|  |
| --- |
| Grunoja | HP: 21800 | Item Drop: Attack 2 |
| Elemental Efficacy | 120, 100, 140, 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★☆☆ Thrust: ★★☆☆ Pierce: ★★☆☆ Strike:★★☆☆ |
| As soon as this battle starts, the game will let you know about the Overdrive function. This function is highlighted through the small circle gauge at the upper right part of the screen. Using Overdrive will restore that character's HP, EP, CP, granting them three extra turns, and an instant magic cast between the two characters that are linked. This is a very powerful function that can be used to exploit bosses. Anyways activate Overdrive by highlighting the attack icon and Holding the Right button when it changes icon, and press the confirm button to do Overdrive. Buff up your characters and attack the boss. The boss has a few abilities, from buffing itself to paralyzing your characters with Seal or hitting a single target really hard. I recommend using Toval's wind magic against this boss, as he can cast them really quickly. Have Rean uses Autumn Leaf Cutter or Arc Slash to delay the boss. If your CP is maxed, save your S-Craft when the Boss's HP is low. |

  
**West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway**

After you have defeated the boss, leave the park, and then go inside the farmhouse on the east side of the map. Speak to the residences there for a small event. Leave the farmhouse, and head south, there is **two treasure chest** around the southwest corner of the map. Once you have picked up the two treasures, take the south exit for a short scene. Head west and pick up the **treasure chest** near the small tower and take the southwest exit to go to East Trista Highway. This is a very short area, there are a total of **three treasure chests** you can pick up along with a fishing location to the west, once you go near the bridge an event scene will play out, Rean will notice a bunch of guards being stationed there. Leave Trista Highway by returning to West Celdic Highway and take the southeast exit to Celdic.

[![Trails of cold steel ii west celdic highway.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/0/04/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_west_celdic_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_west_celdic_highway.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii east trista highway.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/9/9e/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_trista_highway.png)

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 | Note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Crop Muncher | Assorted Grains | Red Beast Flesh | (On East Celdic Highway) |
| Deathcargot | Clear Gelatin | Chitinous Shell |
| Fanged Wolf | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fan |
| Ripper Squirrel | Tear Balm | Red Beast Flesh |
| Evil Crow | Fresh Egg | Red Beast Flesh |
| King Dragonfly | Hearty Powder | Curia Balm |
| Acerbic Tomartian | Acerbic Tomato | U-Material |
| Zwordar | Hearty Powder | U-Material | (On East Celdic Highway) |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Celestial Balm | West Celdic Highway 2 |
| White Glasses |
| Shield 2 | West Celdic Highway 1 |
| EP Charge I | East Trista Highway 1 |
| Earth Lance |
| Curia Balm |

### Celdic

* * *

[![Trails of cold steel ii celdic.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/6/6b/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_celdic.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_celdic.png)

When you enter Celdic, there will be three key event locations for you to visit. They are all marked with a red exclamation mark on the map.

*   **Becky** - Celdic House (Near West Celdic Highway entrance)
*   **Margot** - Weathercock Inn (Behind the counter)
*   **Rosine** - Grand Market

After conversing with the individuals mentioned earlier, an event scene will unfold in Celdic. During this event, Rean purchases a copy of the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**. After reading through it and exiting out of the menu, another event scene will trigger.

Next, make your way to the Grand Market. Here, you should buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** and **Black Records #2** (**Second Playthrough only**) from Cornette's shop, located at the center of the Grand Market.

Afterwards, head to the Chapel. Speak with the elderly lady, Moulbaix, situated on the west end of the Chapel. She will teach you the recipe for [Fresh Vegetable Juice](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Fresh_Vegetable_Juice "walkthrough/Recipe List").

With these tasks completed, exit the town by heading towards East Celdic Highway.

|  |
| --- |
| Recipe | Fresh Vegetable Juice | Old Lady, Moulbaix: Celdic Chapel |
| Book | Gambler Jack Reprint #2 | Cornette's General Goods (Grand Market, center) |
| Black Records #2 | Cornette's General Goods (Grand Market, center)(Second Playthrough only) |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1 | Tarim: Near the Farm on East Celdic Highway |

**East Celdic Highway**

[![Trails of cold steel ii east celdic highway.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3c/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway.png)

| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Silver Earring | East Celdic Highway 1 |
| Tearal Balm |
| U-Material x3 | East Celdic Highway 2 |
| Mute |

Head to the northern part of the map to locate a treasure chest containing **Silver Earrings**. Afterward, journey to the northeast corner where the farmhouse is situated. Talk to **Tarim**, an NPC near the farmhouse, who will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II Chapter 1**. These books have a very limited time frame to obtain, so be sure to collect all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II. Collecting all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II lets you exchange for the strongest weapon later in the game.

Note: If you happen to miss acquiring a volume of Gambler Jack II, there is still a chance to obtain them by purchasing them from a pawn shop using the **Inspect Curios** function. However, please be aware that this method is unreliable and relies entirely on luck.

Then move to the bridge in the southeast part of the map, a fishing spot can be found. There is also a treasure chest located just a little past the bridge. Open it to trigger an event scene in which Rean discovers an **Old Key**.

Lastly, go to the windmill in the center-south of the map and watch the event scene there. Afterward, [Machias](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Character_Notes#Machias_1 "walkthrough/Character Notes") will join your party. Return to Celdic to continue your journey.

| Date | Character | Requirements |
| --- | --- | --- |
| December 1 | Rean [Page 1] | Automatic. |
| Toval [Page 1] | Key event on December 1st (Automatic). |
| Rosine [Page 1] | Speak to Rosine after Machias join your party. |
| Elliot [Page 1] | Automatic. |

While in Celdic, head to the Market Manager's House located in the southwest area of the map. Speak to Manager Otto and read the request. This will add the quest section to your Notebook and introduce you to **AP (Academic Points)**, which are earned based on your choices in each chapter. Earning the maximum AP in each chapter will result in an **S rank**.

Next, visit the Chapel and talk to Rosine. She will provide you with three Tear Balms and add page 1 to her profile. Complete the following request as listed below.

  
**Note:** Mira from Quest are received at the end of each Act.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Munch no More

* * *

Head to East Celdic Highway 2 and find the quest monster located at the northeast corner of the map. After defeating the monster, you will be given the choice to either instantly return to Celdic or stay where you are.

Choose to return to Celdic and report to Manager Otto at the Market Manager's House. As a reward for completing this quest, you will receive the **Detection Quartz**. It's a good idea to always keep the Detection Quartz equipped as it will display all the treasure chests on the mini-map.

|  |
| --- |
| Giant Crop Muncher | HP: 40250 | Item Drop: N/A |
| Elemental Efficacy | 110, 90, 120, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★★☆ Thrust: ★★★☆ Pierce: ★★★☆ Strike:★★★☆ |
|  |
| Crop Muncher x7 | HP: 3680 | Item Drop: Assorted Grains, Red Beast Flesh |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 80, 180, 120 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★★☆ Thrust: ★★★☆ Pierce: ★★★☆ Strike:★★★☆ |
| Client | Market Manager Otto |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Detection, 1500 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

####  [![StoryquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/7/78/StoryquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:StoryquestCS2.png) Story Quest: Herbal Remedies

* * *

Head to the Celdic Chapel and speak to Father Zirbel behind the altar. Then go to the Grand Market and speak to Flint by the stall on the northwest side. Afterward, leave town by going to West Celdic Highway. Continue north until you reach near the Lunaria Nature Park Entrance. Speak to Johnson, the NPC near the gate. Enter [Lunaria Nature Park](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_1#Lunaria_Nature_Park "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 1") and find the Cure Herb located at the northeast corner of the map near a treasure chest. Once you pick up the herb, you will be given the option to either instantly return to Celdic or stay where you are. Choose to return to Celdic and give the Cure Herb to Father Zirbel to complete the quest.

[![Trails of cold steel ii cure herb.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/37/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_cure_herb.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_cure_herb.jpg)

| Client | Father Zirbel |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Teara Balm x2, Celestial Balm x2, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

After you have finished the request listed above, exit out of Celdic by going to East Celdic Highway and then enter the Windmill at the south area of the map. Examine the communication device, select the second choice to advance the story forward. After the event scene, you will need to rendezvous at Point D with your party members. Point D is located on East Celdic Highway 3. You can go to East Celdic Way 3 by taking the east exit of East Celdic Highway 2.

**East Celdic Highway 3**

[![Trails of cold steel ii east celdic highway 3.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/2/28/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway_3.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_east_celdic_highway_3.png)

Pick up the **Sepith Mass** at the treasure chest directly at the northeast corner. Then head for **Point D** immediately, because you will get two party members to join you. **Point D is Located at the Northeast end of the map.** When Eliot and Fie join your party, the game will let you know that the [Overdrive](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Overdrive "walkthrough") function will only work between Rean and his friends, for the rest of the class, you will need to overcome trials found in Monster Chest to use the Overdrive function between them. Now that you have a full group, the game will let you know use the Burst function during Link attacks and also the ability to switch party members in battle. Go back west to the center area, your next destination is the Twin Dragons Bridge, which is located at the southeast exit and the southwest exit. If you take the southwest exit, you will find a Monster Chest that contains a **Gladiator Headband**. Pick up all the treasure chests on the southwest area of East Celdic Highway 3. At the **southwest end of the map lies a blue treasure chest**. These treasure chests are known as **Trial Chest**, it's a monster chest that forces you to use a prearranged party, if you clear it, you will unlock the Overdrive function between them and also some Link EXP. For the upcoming Trial Chest, it is highly recommended to equip Faint Resistant accessory for the fight, it will make your life much easier. When your done take the Southeast exit to Twin Dragons Bridge.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Senior Bear Mole | 20250 (Normal) | 110, 60, 180, 110 | Crest R | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Bear Mole x4 | 5145 (Normal) | 110, 60, 180, 110 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Hammer Swing. Single, knocks back and can inflict Faint.Jump slam. Single, can inflict Faint. |
| It is highly recommended you equip one of your party members with a Faint Resistant accessory before you begin this fight. You should have found one by now, there is one from a treasure chest in Lunaria Park, which is the Citrus Bottle accessory. Each mole can cause faint with one of its attacks, you should have full CP before you start this fight, wait till all the moles gather at one spot, so you can finish them off with your S-Craft and then focus on the main boss. If you do not have S-Craft ready, then I have Machias use his Petrify Shell to hit as many enemies as possible. I would suggest using Eliot's area attack arts and also as your main healer. |
| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Flying Feline | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Eerie Bug | Clear Gelatin | Hearty Powder |
| Axebird | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Bear Mole | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Scary Dinosaur | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Sepith Mass x100 | East Celdic Highway 3 |
| Celestial Balm |
| Feather Boots |
| Coral Ring |
| Gladiator Headband | Twin Dragons Bridge - Celdic Side |

### Twin Dragons Bridge

* * *

| Recipe: Cheese Omelet | Morize: Twin Dragons Bridge - Waiting Lounge |
| --- | --- |
| Quest: A Cry For Help | Head to Celdic East Highway 2 after you have seen an event scene with a merchant and a soldier arguing. |

Watch the Key event, and head to the waiting lounge which is located the north side of the map. When you're inside, speak to the girl **Morize** on the northwest corner, she will teach you the **Cheese Omelet** recipe. Now exit out of the building and then go near the bridge to trigger an event scene with a **merchant arguing with a soldier**. After this, you can do a hidden quest.

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: A Cry For Help

* * *

To start this hidden quest, you need to leave Twin Dragons Bridge after witnessing the event where Merchant Albel argues with the soldier. Head north until you're close to Celdic East Highway 2, and an event scene will trigger.

You will encounter the Merchant on [East Celdic Highway 3](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_1_Part_1#East_Celdic_Highway_3 "walkthrough/Act 1 Part 1"), near the location where you found the Chest containing 100 Sepith Mass. Engage and defeat the monsters in this area to complete the quest. Afterward, select the first choice to return instantly to Twin Dragons Bridge.

| Client | Merchant Albel |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Red Pendulum, 2000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Go back to **Waiting Lounge** and speak to the **three merchants** located on the right, left and center (they are all marked with a red exclamation mark). Then go to the east side of the building, this will trigger an event scene. After you have finished all side activities, examine the duct to advance the story forward. Just keep moving inside the duct it will eventually lead you outside, go to the east exit, and then take the east exit again to go to the Garrelia side of Twin Dragons Bridge.

**Twin Dragons Bridge - Garrelia Side**

[![Trails of cold steel ii twin dragons bridge garrelia.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_garrelia.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_twin_dragons_bridge_garrelia.png)

Take the southeast exit to go Garrelia Byroad. Take the north exit that is very close to the entrance, this will take you back to the Garrelia Side, in here you can find a merchant right under the bridge. You can buy the costume attachment item **"Contact Lens"** from him instead of exchanging it with U-Material for later. Return by to Garrelia Byroad, go east until the path split, you can then go northwest to find a Celestial Balm in a treasure chest. Continue east, when the path split, you can go to the north end to find a **Defense 2** quartz in a treasure box. Then return back and go to the east path, eventually, it will go south, in here you can find a treasure on the west end and also a two treasure chests on the east side along with Trial Chest. When you clear the monster in the Trial Chest, you can use Overdrive function for Eliot and Fie.

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Turtle Bug | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Dirty Rat | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Moon Mole | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Scavenger Crow | Fresh Egg | Red Beast Flesh |
| Cockatrice | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Thunder Bee | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Celestial Balm | Garrelia Byroad 1 |
| Defense 2 |
| Flexible Coat |
| Sepith x100 |
| Tearal Balm |
| Holy Chain | Garrelia Byroad 2 |
| EP Charge I |
| Reaper |
| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Queen Bee | 22419 (Normal) | 110, 60, 180, 110 | Luminous Ray R | ★★☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★★★★ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Thunder Bee x2 | 4836 (Normal) | 110, 60, 180, 110 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | ★★☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★★★★ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Sting. Single, can inflict poison. |
| Have Fie use Sweep every turn until trash mobs are dead, then switch to Scud Reaper. Than have Elliot use his Resounding Beat on Fie every time it fades. Than have Eliot use his Holy Song if Fie's HP is low. When no healing is needed, use Heatwave. |

Now continue southeast and you will find a treasure chest near the south exit. Take the south exit to go Garrelia Byroad 2. Go east and when the path split, go south to find a **Holy Chain** in a treasure chest. Return and continue east, and when the path split, go all the way south to find an optional area. Go inside to enter the **Terra Shrine**.

**Terra Shrine**

Head downstairs, and open the gate to enter the main area of the Spirit Cave.

[![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/6/66/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine.png)

| Monster Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Coin Beetle | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Lantern Tarantula | Clear Gelatin | Hearty Powder |
| Dastardly Amalgam | Coarse Rock Salt | Chitinous Shell |
| Ingot Beetle | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Treasure | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Seal | Terra Spirit Cave |
| Tearal Balm |
| Septium Vein |

Go west and then take the stairs go to the south end to find a **Trial Chest**. When you cleared the Trial, you will unlock the Overdrive function between **Fie and Machias**.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Giant Amalgam | 22462 (Normal) | 100, 80, 120, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Frost Edge R | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★★ |
| Dastardly Amalgam | 5145 (Normal) | 100, 80, 120, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Coarse Rock Salt, Chitinous Shell | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★★ |
| Boss Skills | Roll. Single, can inflict Petrify. |
| Fie: Sweep every turn until trash mobs are death, then switch to Scud Reaper.Machias: Energy Shell when Fie is under 2/3 HP. Heatwave if no healing is needed. |

Then go to the north side of the map, you can find a **Seal Quartz** at the south east of the map, then continue on by taking the northwest path. It will eventually lead to a dead end, from here go to the southeast area to find a switch, press it to raise the stairs to access the south area. Go the west area, pick up the **Tearal Balm** right near the Giant Beetle, then go west, head to the north end to find a monster chest. Defeat the monster inside to get the **Septium Vein** quartz. Now go to the south end of the map, you will find a switch just past the Giant Beetle. Press the switch, it will raise the stairs letting you access to the boss area on the west end. Defeating the boss will give you **three AP**. Now take the elevator and leave.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Tildawn Gaia x3 | 32670 (Normal) | 0, 100, 100, 120, 130, 130, 130 | Curia Balm, U-Material | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Eye laser. Line.Black energy. All, can inflict Poison.Green energy. All, can inflict Petrify.Needle Shot. Single (earth art). |
| Each of the boss has a really deadly area attack skills that can poison your party members. Have Eliot as your main healer, and using someone like Fie as a tank, as Fie has a good chance of dodging the boss's attack, her Bullet Cyclone ability also works wonder against this boss as it has the ability to AT delay them. Toval can come in handy as he can Seal them with his Double Strike craft. In the Worst case scenario, you can use Machias as a backup healer with his Energy Shell craft. |

When your back at Garrelia Byroad 2, go back up north and then go east to find an **EP Charge**. Then continue on by going southeast, when the path split again, go all the way to the southeast end to find a monster chest with the **Reaper Quartz**. Then return north and go all the way to the northeast end to find the entrance to Garrelia Fortress. Use the Orbment Station and save your game before you enter.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Xeno | 87175 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90 | N/A | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Leonidas | 89375 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90 | N/A | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| This is actually an unwinnable battle. But for you to get the bonus AP, you need to reduced one of the boss's HP to only have 30% HP or below by 40 turns. The best way to do this is to come in with a full CP party. Use Rean to buff your entire party, then use your S-Craft with everyone and even the Overdrive command. When all those commands are used up, your party members should use AT Delay skills such as Rean's Arc Slash and Fie's Bullet Cyclone. Then have Elliot as your main healer. When the boss has less 50% HP left, they will use their S-Craft on you, which can deal roughly 70% of your health, so be careful during this phase. Xeno can also lay mines, if you intend on getting the battle trophy, make sure you can scan one of the mines as well. |

After this, you will participate in another boss battle.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Idle Stance | Attack Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Drakkhen (Sword) x2 | 95000 (Normal) | 100, 120, 120, 100 | N/A | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★★★☆ | B:★☆☆☆ | H:★★★★ | A:★★☆☆ |
| This mech battle is quite straightforward, just focus on defeating one Drakkhen Unit. Attack the Drakkhen's body during it's idle stance, and attack the head when it switches to an offensive stance. Use the picture below as a reference if you are not quite sure about which position to attack. When you defeat one unit, a scene will occur, ending the battle. |
| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Idle Stance | Attack Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Drakkhen (Sword) | 95000 (Normal) | 100, 120, 120, 100 | N/A | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★★★☆ | B:★☆☆☆ | H:★★★★ | A:★★☆☆ |
| Drakkhen (Gun) | 104800 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 120 | N/A | B:★★☆☆ | H:★★★☆ | A:★☆☆☆ | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★☆☆☆ |
| This is almost the same as the previous fight, except your party members will now act as backup pilot. This means you can have one additional turn and abilities that are based on your partner. The backup pilot can also do three things, EX Arts which is abilities based on them, Shinki (Restore HP but requires EP) or Charge (restore EP). You can switch to a different partner by pressing the R Button. This battle has a gun type Drakkhen, the gun type has a different weakness, attack the Head during its idle stance and attack the body when it uses its offensive stance. When you win this battle, you will get a 100 Link EXP between your partner. |

When you can control Rean again, head to the Resting Area which is the building located at the north side of the map. Speak to Arbekker and he will give you a copy of [![TrailsbookiconZ.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/d/d5/TrailsbookiconZ.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:TrailsbookiconZ.png) **Gambler Jack II - Chapter II**. You can also find Monica (General Store) and Munk (Dining tables Southeast) on this map. Speaking to them doesn't add a character note, but it will put their profiles into your notebook. When you all ready to go examine Valimar and pick the first choice to advance the story.

### December 4

* * *

| Recipe: Tomato Jelly | Purchase the Tomato Jelly Recipe Book from the General Store. |
| --- | --- |
| Quest: Leaf it to Me | Speak to Alf & Kiki near the Station. |

Once you have control over Rean, the game will let you know about [bonding events](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Bonding_Events "walkthrough"). Bonding events are highlighted with a **yellow exclamation mark** on the map. Bonding events will reveal additional backstory for the character you are attending and improve your relationship with them. To attend a Bonding Event, you need Bonding Points. You are only given a limited amount of Bonding Points, which makes it impossible to see all of them on the first playthrough. However, you can get additional Bonding Points on New Game+ playthroughs.

Attend the bonding events, doing Machias and Claire's bonding event will add a page to their profiles.

| Character | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Machias [Page 1] | Attend Machias' Bonding Event. |
| Claire [Page 1] | Attend Claire's Bonding Event. |
| Character | Location | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Claire | Near Station | Add Page 1 to Claire's Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |
| Eliot | Inn & Pub | Link EXP +500 |
| Fie | Baron's Manion | Link EXP +500 |
| Machias | Near Phoenix Wings | Add Page 1 to Machias' Character Profile.Link EXP +500 |
| Toval | Footbath | Link EXP +500 |

Now go to the general store and purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe. If you leave town by the southeast exit, you can play the [snowboard](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Mini_Games#Snowboarding "walkthrough/Mini Games") mini game. The snowboard mini game will give you prizes depending on your performance of each course. There is an **hidden quest** you can do, speak to Alf and Kiki near the Station.

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Leaf it to Me

* * *

To initiate this quest, interact with either Alf or Kiki, they're the two kids near the station. Choose the first dialogue option to offer your assistance. After accepting the quest, exit out of town and head to Ymir Valley.

In Ymir Valley, you need to find two different types of colored leaves for Alf and Kiki. The first leaf is located at the northwest corner of Ymir Valley 1. The second leaf can be found in the upper southeast corner of Ymir Valley 2, near a treasure chest. Once you have collected both leaves, return to Alf and Kiki to complete the quest.

Please note that there is a monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley, so be sure to scan it if you want to complete the Battle Trophy.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Leaf Location 1 | Leaf Location 2 |
| Client | Alf & Kiki |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Mishy Plushie, 1500 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

After you finish all side activities, head to your room at the Baron's mansion, and pick the first choice to end part 1. The game will then accumulate all the AP you have earned throughout the chapter. You will get a S-Rank if you manage to get a total of **35 AP**.

| Results | AP |  |

| Meet up with 4th Panzer Division | 8 |
| Put up a fight against Xeno and Leonidas | 3 |
| Explore the Terra Shrine | 3 |
| Quest: Munch no More | 4 |
| Quest: Herbal Remedies | 4 |
| Quest: A Cry For Help [Hidden] | 4 |
| Quest: Leaf it to Me [Hidden] | 4 |
